title: LLM Response Interpretation Agent Output Schema
description: This schema validates the output format from the LLM Response Interpretation Agent, ensuring the explanation and recommended prompt changes are correctly structured.

explanation.description: A textual explanation of the prompt changes.

recommended_prompt_changes.description: A list of recommended prompt changes.

location.description: A description of where the change should be applied.

new_text_markdown.description: The new prompt text in markdown format.
